    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    ACTION_POINTS - Enum constant in enum class jogo.models.ResourceType
    Represents the action currency required for a player to perform builds or upgrades during a turn.
    addActionPointsCorrectly() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if base Action Points are added correctly.
    addBaseActionPoints(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Player
    Permanently increases the player's maximum baseline Action Points and updates the current available pool.
    addResource(ResourceType, int) - Method in class jogo.models.Player
    Adds a specified quantity of a resource to the player's inventory.
    addResourcesCorrectly() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if resources are added correctly to the player's inventory.
    addScore(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Player
    Increments the player's total victory score.
    addScoreCorrectly() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if score is added correctly to the player.
    addStructure(Structures, int, int) - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMap
    Places a structure onto the map grid at the specified coordinates.
    addStructuresOutsideTheMap() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if adding a structure outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    addStructuresThrowingSpaceAlreadyOccupiedException() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if adding a structure to an already occupied position throws SpaceAlreadyOccupiedException.
    addStructuresWithoutThrows() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if a structure can be added to the map without throwing exceptions.
